name: search_web
description: Search the web using Google Search for current information, facts, news, or answers to questions

query.description: The search query (e.g., 'latest SpaceX launch', 'weather in NYC', 'who won the 2024 election')

name: open_in_browser
description: Open a URL in the user's default web browser (for viewing files, pages, or links)

url.description: The complete URL to open in browser (e.g., 'https://drive.google.com/file/d/xxx/view')
